_comment: Gate 5 — AC-I18N evidence. No hardcoded user-facing strings; locale-ready Indonesian + English. Graded by a fresh-context reviewer: initial FAIL (~30 hardcoded chrome strings) -> fixed -> re-verified PASS.
dictionary: apps/dashboard/lib/i18n.ts — EN+ID for every user-facing string; t(key,lang) + tf(key,lang,vars) interpolation
scope_localized: nav aria-label, incident-chip title, language/theme toggle title+aria-label
chart aria-labels + DETECTED label, blast-map aria-label
dial state notes, recovery-plan intro, plan cite, model line (interpolated)
ALL table headers (Incident/Fleet/System), FleetState line, match/page, Prev/Next
drawer aria-label + every kv label + close button, effective-autonomy note
Enrolled/Online/Offline KPIs, dual-control sub, no-pending-approvals, time-box
signals/confidence/mode labels, approver-#2 suffix, LLM-advisory sub
intentionally_verbatim_data_tokens: host ids, IPs, timestamps, OPR-03 · SOC-A, UTC
reviewer_verdict: PASS — all flagged chrome/labels/tooltips/headers/buttons now t()/tf() with real EN+ID; no remaining hardcoded aria-label/title/placeholder/header/button strings
